title: Kai Yat Sai
description: A Thai-style stuffed omelette filled with minced chicken or tofu, vegetables, and savory sauces.
steps: Whisk the eggs with 1 tbsp of fish sauce.
Prepare all vegetables: finely chop green beans, spring onions, coriander, shallot; quarter cherry tomatoes; crush garlic.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat (around 180°C). Fry garlic and shallots, ensuring they do not burn.
Add minced chicken (or mushrooms or tofu) and fry until halfway cooked. Add green beans and cook for 5 minutes.
Add coriander, cherry tomatoes, spring onions, soy sauce, oyster sauce, tomato ketchup, remaining fish sauce, and white pepper. Fry for 5 more minutes.
Using a ladle and a large pan, cook thin omelettes (about 2 ladles of egg mixture per omelette). Fill each omelette with the cooked mixture and fold.
